successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.validation.ts exists and exports Zod schemas exactly as specified in the detailed phase architecture: createLeaveSchema (with employee_id, leave_type_id, start_date, end_date, reason, and refinement), approveLeaveParamsSchema (id), rejectLeaveParamsSchema (id), rejectLeaveBodySchema (reason), cancelLeaveParamsSchema (id), getLeaveParamsSchema (id), getBalanceParamsSchema (employee_id, year).

constraints: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing (Zod schemas)
Implement schemas exactly as specified in the detailed phase architecture (authoritative source)
Export all schemas from the file
No sensitive data in logs (general principle, though not directly exercised by this file)
Adhere to modular-monolith dependency direction: leave module only imports from allowed modules (here only zod)
outOfScope: Implementing business logic or database access
Testing the schemas (only file creation required)
